disallowed_edits: Do not alter historical RESULT.md or proof packets to improve a narrative.
Do not change metric values unless a recomputation proof artifact supports the change.
Do not replace unrepaired iter179 as the public metric from documentation review alone.
Do not broaden claims from audit prose, literature notes, or product language.
required_policy: A future audit may make only surgical freshness edits when a concrete stale active gate, current metric, result path, or next-action mismatch is found.
